title: 10 Gulden

obverse.description:
Red and dark green on multicolor underprint.
Central Bank Building in Paramaribo at center; bananas at upper left. 
Vertical serial number in red color.
obverse.lettering:
CENTRALE BANK VAN SURINAME
10 Gulden
1 DECEMBER 1996
TIEN Gulden
obverse.lettering_translation:
Central Bank of Suriname
10 Gulden
December 1st., 1996
Ten Gulden

reverse.description: Coat of Arms at upper right; banana harvesting at center right; toucan at left.
reverse.lettering:
VIJF Gulden

THOMAS DE LA RUE AND COMPANY LIMITED
NADRUK VERBODEN SURINAAMS WETBOEK VAN STRAFRECHT - ARTIKEL 260
reverse.lettering_translation:
Ten Guilders

Thomas de La Rue and Company Limited
Emphasis Forbidden Suriname's Criminal Code - Article 260

comments:
Banknotes series AD000001 through AD400000 were issued (reprinted) in 1992.
Banknotes series AD400001 through AE500000 were issued (reprinted) in 1994.

P#137a, signature Henk Goedschalk (2nd type) - President of the Central Bank of Suriname from January 1985 until January 1994 and from January 1997 until August 2000.
P#137b (1995/1996), signature André Telting - President of the Central Bank of Suriname from March 1994 until February 1996 and from September 2000 until August 2010.
P#137b (1998), signature Henk Goedschalk (3rd type) - President of the Central Bank of Suriname from January 1985 until January 1994 and from January 1997 until August 2000.

 

Solid 0.4mm security thread.
